text.title: Pricing Experiment Design Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the methodology end-to-end with decision gates.

step.name: decide-apply-vs-skip
step.input: Trigger inputs (see Prerequisites) + decision tree in 06-decision-tree.xml
step.action: Verify all Applies-If preconditions hold and no Skip-If trigger fires. If unsure, walk the decision tree.
step.decision-gate: If decision != apply, STOP. Document skip rationale with the matching rule reference.

step.name: gather-typed-inputs
step.action: Collect each prerequisite with declared type and source citation. Reject untyped / unsourced inputs.
step.decision-gate: If any required input missing, STOP and request from the named owner.

step.name: draft-pricing-experiment-design
step.input: Typed input bundle + applicable rules from 01-core-rules.xml
step.action: Draft the Pricing Experiment Design artefact per the schema in 02-output-contract.xml. Anchor every non-trivial field to a citation.

step.name: validate-output
step.decision-gate: If validator exits non-zero, return to step 3.

step.name: register-and-review
step.action: Commit the artefact to its canonical location; set owner, last_touched, and version. Notify the named human reviewer.
